raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 is resting on the table and its top surface is unobstructed. The left arm can reach the top of box_2 without colliding with box_1 or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is held firmly against the table by the left arm, reducing the risk of tipping or sliding when the upper box is removed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm has a clear lateral approach to box_1's side faces while the left arm stabilizes box_2. Sufficient clearance exists above box_1 to lift it vertically without striking surrounding objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by the right arm and lifted clear of box_2, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 is resting on the table and its top surface is unobstructed. The left arm can reach the top of box_2 without colliding with box_1 or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is held firmly against the table by the left arm, reducing the risk of tipping or sliding when the upper box is removed.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm has a clear lateral approach to box_1's side faces while the left arm stabilizes box_2. Sufficient clearance exists above box_1 to lift it vertically without striking surrounding objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by the right arm and lifted clear of box_2, completing the pick-up task.
